component.name: ToggleNote
component.summary: Lightweight sticky notes that float above everything

description.p: ToggleNote is a fast, native sticky-notes application that stays on top of your other windows. Write quick notes, organize ideas, and keep them visible without clutter.

ul.li: Always-on-top notes that float above other windows
Fully customizable toolbar with drag-and-drop reordering
Global hotkeys to show/hide all notes
System tray integration with ghost mode
Flat text files — no databases, no vendor lock-in
